dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3784 IS: Accounting STEM Pursuit Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Collins (for herself and Ms. Rosen) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions

form.official-title: To amend the Student Support and Academic Enrichment Grant program to promote career awareness in accounting as part of a well-rounded STEM educational experience.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Accounting STEM Pursuit Act.

section.header: Accounting as part of a well-rounded educational experience
section.text: Subpart 1 of part A of title IV of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 7111 et seq.) is amended—

subparagraph.text: striking or at the end of subclause (VI);
inserting after subclause (VI) the following new subclause:

subclause.text: accounting education, including accounting career awareness; or

subparagraph.text: striking or at the end of subparagraph (I);
inserting after subparagraph (I) the following new subparagraph:

activities to promote the development, implementation, and strengthening of programs to teach accounting, including increasing access to high-quality accounting courses for students through grade 12 who are members of groups underrepresented in accounting careers; or
